legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, native file pickers, YouTube/URL playback, Preview/Reader, Publish/Republish, persistence-after-reload, slide duplication, cross-browser, or a11y-in-Reader flows.

mappings.reason: Launch Studio URL + listing page — environment bootstrap handled by cy.openAuthoringTool, not a component assertion
Create math activity (basic info) — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Start authoring redirect — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Add Generic Step — step-creation flow; Video is a canvas element, not a Generic Step widget
Enter Step Title — step-wizard flow outside the Video element
Cancel button in step creation — step-wizard flow
Change Step button — step-wizard flow
Enter Instructions for Students — page-level field, not the Video element
Enter Instructions for Teachers — page-level field, not the Video element
